Student Reality Lab v2

Chat-first housing analysis with tool and chart results inline.

The UI is now structured around assistant messages, MCP tool cards, and graph specs so Phase 6 can plug in orchestration without changing the presentation contract.

ModeLive API
Tool cards0
Charts0
StatusReady
Assistant

Ask for a metro trend, a snapshot comparison, an affordability estimate, or the current data source status.

Shift+Enter for a new line. Enter to send.
